## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds with no TypeScript errors
- [ ] Docs (README/CHANGELOG/etc.) updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Tests added or updated for any new/changed logic

> Note: per [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md), merging external code into this repo requires the maintainer's explicit agreement first — please make sure this change was discussed in an issue before investing significant time here.
